caption: The video depicts a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, held on April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The scene shows a panel of individuals seated around a table, engaged in discussion. A man with a beard and glasses, wearing a suit and tie, is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands, emphasizing his points. To his left, another man in a suit appears to be listening intently, while a woman with blonde hair, dressed in a black floral top, is also paying close attention. Behind them, an older man in a vest and tie is adjusting his tie, possibly preparing to speak or react to the ongoing discussion. The setting includes microphones, water bottles, and other items on the table, indicating a structured and official environment. The background features a door with a sign that reads "Military Affairs," reinforcing the formal nature of the meeting.
